# Responsibility

One theme that keeps popping up as essential for TWOLD is responsibility.

I think that may be becoming one of the central themes.

It may be good to have responsibility be the primary [Depictions of virtue](../Features/Depictions%20of%20virtue%20d3f3b663de9446b0aff4183df49926e3.md).
